summary: P0/P1/P2 Bug Fix Testing - ALL 3 ISSUES VERIFIED AS FIXED. P0: Help & Support shows 8 fallback articles when KB API returns empty. P1: Profile name correctly displays 'Nomadly' (not 'Bozz Mail'). P2: User Menu dropdown has both 'Profile' and 'Settings' items that navigate to /profile.
critical_code_review_comments: P0 FIX VERIFIED: HelpAndSupport/index.tsx properly falls back to HelpAndSupportData (8 hardcoded articles) when KB API returns empty or errors
P0 FIX VERIFIED: Search functionality falls back to client-side filtering of hardcoded data when search API returns empty
P1 FIX VERIFIED: Login API returns name='Nomadly', Profile API returns name='Nomadly', UI header displays 'Nomadly'
P2 FIX VERIFIED: UserMenu/index.tsx has both Profile (data-testid='user-menu-profile') and Settings (data-testid='user-menu-settings') menu items
P2 FIX VERIFIED: Profile menu item navigates to /profile page correctly
Translation key 'profile' added to dashboardLayout.json for i18n support

success_rate.backend: 100% (Login API, Profile API, KB API - all working correctly)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 3 bugs verified fixed via UI testing)

test_credentials.login_flow: Two-step: 1) Enter email -> Continue 2) Select Password radio -> Enter password -> Continue

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0/P1/P2 bugs verified fixed. Token-based auth for Playwright testing works by setting token in localStorage. Help & Support page at /help-support requires authentication. User menu dropdown opens by clicking on username in header.

P0_help_fallback_articles.description: Help & Support page shows 8 hardcoded fallback articles when KB API returns empty
articles_found: How Crypto Payments Work for Merchants

P2_profile_menu_item.description: User Menu dropdown has 'Profile' link alongside 'Settings'
